questionText: Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.
questionLabel: [Q2][hard] Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH channel_sales AS (
  SELECT
    so."Channel",
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS total_revenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT so."Sales Order") AS total_orders,
    COUNT(*) AS order_lines,
    AVG(s."Sales Amount") AS avg_line_amount,
    (SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost")) / SUM(s."Sales Amount") * 100 AS gross_margin_pct
  FROM "Sales" s
  JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
  GROUP BY so."Channel"
),
total_rev AS (
  SELECT SUM(total_revenue) AS overall_total FROM channel_sales
)
SELECT
  cs."Channel",
  cs.total_revenue,
  cs.total_revenue / tr.overall_total * 100 AS revenue_share_pct,
  cs.total_orders,
  cs.order_lines,
  cs.avg_line_amount,
  cs.gross_margin_pct
FROM channel_sales cs
CROSS JOIN total_rev tr
ORDER BY cs.total_revenue DESC;"}

Return columns: Subcategory, order_lines, revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH subcat_metrics AS (
SELECT
p."Subcategory",
COUNT(*) AS order_lines,
SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue,
SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold,
SUM(s."Sales Amount") / SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS revenue_per_unit,
SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit
FROM "Sales" s
JOIN "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
GROUP BY p."Subcategory"
),
avg_list AS (
SELECT
"Subcategory",
AVG("List Price") AS avg_list_price
FROM "Product"
GROUP BY "Subcategory"
)
SELECT
m."Subcategory",
m.order_lines,
m.revenue,
m.units_sold,
m.revenue_per_unit,
a.avg_list_price,
m.gross_profit,
CASE WHEN m.revenue > 0 THEN (m.gross_profit / m.revenue) * 100 ELSE NULL END AS margin_pct
FROM subcat_metrics m
JOIN avg_list a ON m."Subcategory" = a."Subcategory"
ORDER BY m.revenue DESC"}

questionLabel: [Q10][hard] Show year-over-year revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal years. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_year all ascending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH agg AS (
  SELECT 
    so."Channel",
    p."Category",
    d."Fiscal Year",
    SUBSTRING(d."Fiscal Year" FROM 3 FOR 4)::BIGINT AS fy_num,
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue
  FROM "Sales" s
  JOIN "Date" d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey"
  JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
  JOIN "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
  GROUP BY so."Channel", p."Category", d."Fiscal Year"
)
SELECT 
  c."Channel",
  c."Category",
  p."Fiscal Year" AS prior_year,
  p.revenue AS prior_revenue,
  c."Fiscal Year" AS current_year,
  c.revenue AS current_revenue,
  ((c.revenue - p.revenue) / p.revenue * 100) AS yoy_growth_pct
FROM agg c
JOIN agg p ON c."Channel" = p."Channel" AND c."Category" = p."Category" AND c.fy_num = p.fy_num + 1
WHERE p.revenue <> 0
ORDER BY c."Channel" ASC, c."Category" ASC, p."Fiscal Year" ASC"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments: {"sql":"WITH AvgList AS ( SELECT \"Category\", AVG(\"List Price\") AS avg_list_price FROM \"Product\" GROUP BY \"Category\" ), Main AS ( SELECT SO.\"Channel\", P.\"Category\", SUM(S.\"Sales Amount\") AS total_revenue, SUM(S.\"Order Quantity\") AS units_sold, SUM(S.\"Sales Amount\") / SUM(S.\"Order Quantity\") AS revenue_per_unit, MAX(AL.avg_list_price) AS avg_list_price, SUM(S.\"Sales Amount\" - S.\"Total Product Cost\") AS gross_profit, (SUM(S.\"Sales Amount\" - S.\"Total Product Cost\") / SUM(S.\"Sales Amount\")) * 100 AS margin_pct FROM \"Sales\" S JOIN \"Sales_Order\" SO ON S.\"SalesOrderLineKey\" = SO.\"SalesOrderLineKey\" JOIN \"Product\" P ON S.\"ProductKey\" = P.\"ProductKey\" JOIN AvgList AL ON P.\"Category\" = AL.\"Category\" GROUP BY SO.\"Channel\", P.\"Category\" ) SELECT \"Channel\", \"Category\", total_revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, ((avg_list_price - revenue_per_unit) / avg_list_price) * 100 AS realized_discount_pct, gross_profit, margin_pct FROM Main ORDER BY \"Channel\" ASC, total_revenue DESC"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH aggregated AS (
SELECT
p."Category",
p."Subcategory",
SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue,
SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold,
SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit
FROM "Sales" s
JOIN "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
GROUP BY p."Category", p."Subcategory"
),
ranked AS (
SELECT
"Category",
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "Category" ORDER BY revenue DESC, "Subcategory" ASC) AS revenue_rank,
"Subcategory",
revenue,
units_sold,
gross_profit,
(revenue / SUM(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY "Category")) * 100 AS category_revenue_share_pct
FROM aggregated
)
SELECT * FROM ranked WHERE revenue_rank <= 2
ORDER BY "Category" ASC, revenue_rank ASC, "Subcategory" ASC"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH channel_rev AS (
SELECT
st."Group" AS grp,
d."Fiscal Year" AS fy,
so."Channel" AS ch,
SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS crev
FROM "Sales" s
JOIN "Sales_Territory" st ON s."SalesTerritoryKey" = st."SalesTerritoryKey"
JOIN "Date" d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey"
JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
GROUP BY grp, fy, ch
),
total_rev AS (
SELECT
grp,
fy,
SUM(crev) AS trev
FROM channel_rev
GROUP BY grp, fy
),
ranked AS (
SELECT
cr.grp,
cr.fy,
cr.ch,
cr.crev,
tr.trev,
(cr.crev / tr.trev) * 100 AS share_pct,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cr.grp, cr.fy ORDER BY cr.crev DESC) AS rn
FROM channel_rev cr
JOIN total_rev tr ON cr.grp = tr.grp AND cr.fy = tr.fy
)
SELECT
grp AS "Group",
fy AS "Fiscal Year",
ch AS top_channel,
crev AS channel_revenue,
trev AS group_year_revenue,
share_pct AS channel_revenue_share_pct
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY "Group" ASC, "Fiscal Year" ASC"}

For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH channel_rev AS (
SELECT
st."Group" AS grp,
d."Fiscal Year" AS fy,
so."Channel" AS ch,
SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS crev
FROM "Sales" s
JOIN "Sales_Territory" st ON s."SalesTerritoryKey" = st."SalesTerritoryKey"
JOIN "Date" d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey"
JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
GROUP BY grp, fy, ch
),
total_rev AS (
SELECT
grp,
fy,
SUM(crev) AS trev
FROM channel_rev
GROUP BY grp, fy
),
ranked AS (
SELECT
cr.grp,
cr.fy,
cr.ch,
cr.crev,
tr.trev,
(cr.crev / tr.trev) * 100 AS share_pct,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cr.grp, cr.fy ORDER BY cr.crev DESC) AS rn
FROM channel_rev cr
JOIN total_rev tr ON cr.grp = tr.grp AND cr.fy = tr.fy
)
SELECT
grp AS "Group",
fy AS "Fiscal Year",
ch AS top_channel,
crev AS channel_revenue,
trev AS group_year_revenue,
share_pct AS channel_revenue_share_pct
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY "Group" ASC, "Fiscal Year" ASC"}
